name: Email Ingestion :: Outlook Trigger V1
description: Reusable Microsoft Outlook polling workflow for Outlook, Hotmail and Live accounts. Normalizes the envelope and forwards it to the common processor. Remains unpublished until Outlook credentials and n8n variables are configured.
